series_metadata.series_description: Correspondence, legal advice, responses to requests for legal advice from clients that do not rise to the level of a formal or informal opinion. Can also include copies of meeting notes, agendas and minutes from client meetings.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 5 years and until no longer of administrative value, or 1 year after elimination of client agency. ; Electronic: 5 years and until no longer of administrative value, or 1 year after elimination of client agency., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
